Text: STL team should be out on tables.
Illinois team keep product on racks by the Main Entrance. Certain stores may have to go down the fertilizer isle or inside the store on Wednesday night. Check your weather every day!
Apron/IGC tables need to be completed this week with exception of Northern Wisconsin/Minnesota. Deadline for all stores is Friday March 13th.
Apron Table 1 Signage (BMSM Slip Sign) 2026 signs are not ready but use last year’s VG BMSM signs this week.
Apron Table 1: 1G VG Dianthus, 1G VG Aubrieta, 1G VG Erysimum, 1G VG Bergenia, 1G VG Carex,
Apron Table 2: VG QT, PW QT, 1G Iberis
Ship to STL Market this week schedule attached.
We need to assist with the unloading process.
